macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stock Indices Open Higher on March 31 After Monday's Mixed Close
items.summary: The S&P 500 opened at 6,395.88, up 0.82%; Dow at 45,541.76, up 0.72%; Nasdaq at 21,064.33, up 1.30%. On Monday, S&P 500 fell 0.4% to 6,343.72, Dow rose 0.1% to 45,216.14, Nasdaq down amid de-risking.

items.title: European and Asian Markets Mixed; Nikkei Drops 1.58%, Korea 4.26%
items.summary: DAX up 0.07% at open, FTSE flat; Hang Seng up 0.15%, ASX up 0.25%, but Nikkei down 1.58% to 51,063.72, Straits Times down 0.24%, Korea Composite down 4.26%.

items.title: S&P 500 in Parabolic Decline, Oversold Amid Iran Conflict Uncertainty
items.summary: S&P 500 closed Monday below major moving averages, RSI under 30 indicating oversold conditions, gravitating toward 6100 support amid indiscriminate de-risking due to Iran tensions.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: IBM and ETH Zurich Launch 10-Year Collaboration on AI and Quantum Algorithms
items.summary: IBM and ETH Zurich announced a 10-year initiative on March 31, 2026, to develop foundational algorithms bridging classical computing, machine learning, and quantum systems. IBM will support new professorships at ETH Zurich for joint research and education in algorithmic innovation.[2]

items.title: Scientists Develop Ultra-Robust Machine-Learning Models for Stable Molecular Simulations
items.summary: Researchers published a study in Communications Chemistry on an AI-powered model that maintains stable molecular simulations under extreme conditions, enabling reliable long-term studies for drug development and materials science without supercomputers.[5]

items.title: Aon Enhances Compensation Database with AI-Specific Job Families
items.summary: Aon launched updates to its Radford McLagan Compensation Database on March 31, 2026, adding AI roles like head of AI and machine learning engineer to provide market transparency amid rising demand for AI talent.[7]

items.title: US Federal Government Pushes to Preempt California AI Regulations in 2026
items.summary: California's new AI laws effective January 1, 2026, including frontier AI safety reporting, face federal preemption efforts, potentially standardizing rules for AI in healthcare, education, and more.[3]

items.title: Unstructured Data Emerges as Key Barrier to AI Value Realization in 2026
items.summary: Enterprises face challenges operationalizing unstructured data at scale, essential for AI success in areas like predictive maintenance and generative AI, amid pressures to control costs and security.[1]

items.title: AI Arms Race Accelerates Cybersecurity Threats with Generative AI and Polymorphic Malware
items.summary: Threat actors leverage generative AI for targeted phishing and machine learning to exploit vulnerabilities faster, demanding unified exposure management beyond traditional defenses.[4]

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Legacy of Kain: Ascendance Releases Today on Multiple Platforms
items.summary: Legacy of Kain: Ascendance, developed by Bit Bot Media and published by Crystal Dynamics, launches March 31 on PC, PS5, Switch, Switch 2, and Series X|S. It's the first new entry in the series since 2003.

items.title: South of Midnight Launches on PS5 and Switch 2
items.summary: South of Midnight releases today, March 31, for PS5 and Switch 2. It's highlighted among the top new game releases for the week.

items.title: Star Wars Announces Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains for June Release
items.summary: Lucasfilm teases Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains, a competitive team-based take on the board game, launching June 11 on PS5, Xbox Series X|S, Switch 1/2, PC, and GeForce NOW. Full reveal set for April 29.

items.title: Canceled Dreamcast Game Propeller Arena Finally Releases After 25 Years
items.summary: Propeller Arena: Aviation Battle Championship, originally canceled post-9/11, is now live online in March 2026 with multiplayer dogfights, though facing network issues. Community is arranging six-player matches via Discord.

items.title: PSO2 New Genesis Headline WAVE Broadcasts Latest Updates Today
items.summary: Sega's Phantasy Star Online 2 New Genesis streams its Headline WAVE program today at 5:00 AM PDT, covering April ver. 2 updates, story content, campaigns, and dev messages.

items.title: Gaming Investment Funds Pivot Away from Industry Amid Slowdown
items.summary: Two of three backed funds shift from gaming to other sectors like satellites, citing flops like Cyberpunk 2077 and MindsEye, GTA 6 delays, and migration to mobile hyper-casual games. AI seen as potential disruptor.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
